{{#invoke:Infobox|main |kind=enemy-infobox |sep=, |images=[[File:StS2 Decimillipede Left.png]], [[File:StS2_Decimillipede.png]], [[File:StS2_Decimillipede Right.png]] |title=Decimillipede |tabs=Front ,Middle ,Back |sections=Main |Main=HP,Debut,Powers |Main_nolabel=yes |HP = 40-46
{{Asc|8|46-52|2}} |Debut=[[StS2:Hive|Hive]] |Powers=25 {{BD|Reattach||2}} }} {{Power Infobox|Reattach|2}} '''Decimillipede''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite Enemy}} found in the {{2|Hive}}. It appears as three identical segments that fight together. == Pattern == {{Intents|Decimillipede|2}} Each segment cycles through {{Int|Decimillipede|Bulk||2}}, {{Int|Decimillipede|Writhe||2}}, and {{Int|Decimillipede|Outgas||2}} in that order. Each segment starts on a different move, so every turn the three segments are always using three different moves. When a segment is killed, it uses {{Int|Decimillipede|Reattach||2}} to revive with 25 HP if at least one other segment is still alive. After reviving, it resumes with a random move. == In Party With == === Hive === * 2 other Decimillipede segments. == Trivia == * This fight is functionally similar to the {{M|Darkling|Darklings}} from Slay the Spire 1, with the same dynamic of 3 enemies that will revive if any of the others are alive. == Version History == *'''Early Access v0.103.2''' **BETA changes incorporated into main branch. * '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)''' ** Nerfed '''Decimillipede''': HP decreased from 42-48 {{Asc|8|(48-56)|2}} to 40-46 {{Asc|8|(46-52)|2}} * '''Early Access v0.98''' ** Added Decimillipede to the game.
